selection_policy: Select five resolver papers covering original DETR, sparse/multi-scale attention, convergence-oriented query design, denoising-anchor training, and real-time DETR-vs-YOLO direction.

papers.title: End-to-end object detection with transformers
papers.selection_reason: 原始 DETR 论文，定义 set prediction、object queries、Hungarian matching 和 NMS-free 端到端检测基线。

papers.title: Deformable DETR: deformable transformers for end-to-end object detection
papers.selection_reason: 代表对 DETR 收敛慢和小目标/多尺度建模不足的核心结构性修正。

papers.title: Conditional DETR for fast training convergence
papers.selection_reason: 代表通过 conditional spatial query 改善训练收敛和定位学习。

papers.title: DINO: DETR with improved DeNoising anchor boxes for end-to-end object detection
papers.selection_reason: 代表用 denoising training 与 anchor/query 改造推动 DETR 系列精度和训练稳定性。

papers.title: DETRs beat YOLOs on real-time object detection
papers.selection_reason: 代表 DETR 进入实时检测与 YOLO 对比的应用化路线。
